name: node-is-path-cwd
title: node-is-path-cwd
summary: Check if a path is CWD
description:
Check if a path is CWD
Node.js module that checks if a path is the working directory.
.
is-path-cwd module is a dependency of webpack-bundle-analyzer,
in turn this is needed for gitlab.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-is-path-cwd because Check if a path is CWD.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-is-path-cwd as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-is-path-cwd with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-is-path-cwd --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
